name: @semiont/sdk
description: Semiont SDK — SemiontClient, namespaces, session/browser, state units, and the bus-request/cache helpers. Transport-agnostic; pair with @semiont/http-transport (HttpTransport) or @semiont/make-meaning (LocalTransport) for the wire.

scripts.pretypecheck: npm run build --workspace=@semiont/core --if-present && npm run build --workspace=@semiont/http-transport --if-present
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && tsup && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && rollup -c rollup.dts.config.mjs && rm -rf dist-types

author: Semiont Team
